buildCommand: npm install && npm run sass:build:min && mkdir -p assets/vendor/js assets/vendor/css && cp node_modules/bootstrap/dist/js/bootstrap.bundle.min.js assets/vendor/js/ && cp node_modules/swiper/swiper-bundle.min.css assets/vendor/css/ && cp node_modules/swiper/swiper-bundle.min.js assets/vendor/js/ && cp node_modules/lenis/dist/lenis.css assets/vendor/css/ && cp node_modules/lenis/dist/lenis.min.js assets/vendor/js/
